title: What Did the Lady Forget?
actors: Sumiko Kurishima, Tatsuo Saitô, Michiko Kuwano
plot: An affluent medical professor, Komiya, and his bossy wife, Tokio, are to look after Setsuko, their high-spirited niece from Osaka. Setsuko is a liberated woman who does what she wants, including smoking, even though she is a minor...
